recommendations.title: The Good Dinosaur
recommendations.overview: An epic journey into the world of dinosaurs where an Apatosaurus named Arlo makes an unlikely human friend.

recommendations.title: Luca
recommendations.overview: Luca and his best friend Alberto experience an unforgettable summer on the Italian Riviera. But all the fun is threatened by a deeply-held secret: they are sea monsters from another world just below the water’s surface.

recommendations.title: Partly Cloudy

recommendations.title: Mater the Greater
recommendations.overview: Mater tells Lightning McQueen about his former job as a daredevil.

recommendations.title: Party Central

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Paperman
recommendations.overview: An urban office worker finds that paper airplanes are instrumental in meeting a girl in ways he never expected.

recommendations.title: Charming
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Romance
recommendations.overview: Three fairy tale princesses find themselves engaged to the same guy, Prince Charming.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: Your Friend the Rat
